title: cerbera dumicola
intro: Cerbera dumicola is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the sea mango or ocean mango. It is native to the tropical regions of the Indo-Pacific and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's seeds, leaves, and bark are used to create remedies, often in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topical applications.
